response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to analyze audio content. 2. Confirmed that the audio consists solely of Minecraft game sound effects and the streamer's voice. 3. Determined that there is no background vocal music present throughout the video. 4. Created scene breaks based on the progression of the farming and trading tasks. 5. Set contains_vocal_music to false for all scenes and set song metadata fields to null as no music was identified.
response.global_summary: The video features a streamer playing Minecraft, specifically focusing on farming and selling melons. There is no background vocal music, only the streamer's commentary and game audio.

scenes.description: The streamer is actively farming a large field of melons in Minecraft, commenting on her experience.
The streamer continues farming melons while discussing in-game strategies and her preferences regarding in-game items.
The streamer reflects on trading mechanics and prepares to move toward the in-game town to sell her collected melons.
The streamer arrives in the town, trades her melons at the farmer shop, and concludes the farming task.
